source.name: Lab 4.1: ask_banking_assistant.yml (fill-in-the-blanks)
source.instructions: **Fill in the blanks** to complete the flow file. **After you pass:** save the completed YAML as **`level6/data/basics/ask_banking_assistant.yml`**, then run the **Code Test** (the next assessment).
source.text:
```yaml
flows:
  ask_banking_assistant:
    name: <<<ask banking assistant>>>
    description: |
      <<<Start when the user wants the banking assistant sub-agent or specialist; delegate balance, transfers, or account info.>>>
    steps:
      - call: <<<banking_assistant>>>
      - action: <<<utter_help>>>
```
source.distractors:
banking_mcp
check_balance
transfer_money
utter_greet
RASA
call_assistant
sub_agent_flow
source.guidance: Top-level key is **`flows:`**. Flow id **`ask_banking_assistant`** matches other flows’ **`active_flow`** hints. **`call:`** must match **`agent.name`** (**`banking_assistant`**). **`utter_help`** is a response action on the main agent after the sub-agent returns. **After you pass,** save the completed YAML as **`level6/data/basics/ask_banking_assistant.yml`**, then run the **Code Test**.

blank: Start when the user wants the banking assistant sub-agent or specialist; delegate balance, transfers, or account info.
